class.name: GDKUser
class.description: Wrapper around an Xbox user handle. Provides identity info like gamertag, XUID, age group, and sign-in state.

method.name: get_local_id
method.description: Returns the local user ID assigned by the GDK runtime.

method.name: get_xuid
method.description: Returns the Xbox User ID (XUID) as a string.

method.name: get_age_group
method.description: Returns the user's age group as an [enum AgeGroup] value.

method.name: get_age_group_name
method.description: Returns the user's age group as a human-readable string.

method.name: get_sign_in_state
method.description: Returns the user's sign-in state as a [enum SignInState] value.

method.name: get_sign_in_state_name
method.description: Returns the user's sign-in state as a human-readable string.

method.name: is_guest
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user is a guest account.

method.name: is_signed_in
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user is currently signed in.

method.name: is_store_user
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user is the store user.

members.member: The local user ID assigned by the GDK runtime.
The Xbox User ID (XUID) as a string.
The user's age group. See [enum AgeGroup].
The user's sign-in state. See [enum SignInState].
[code]true[/code] if the user is a guest account.
[code]true[/code] if the user is currently signed in.
[code]true[/code] if the user is the store user.

constants.constant: User is in the process of signing out.
